title: Supplier Corrective Action Request (SCAR)
title_vi: Yeu cau hanh dong khac phuc nha cung cap (SCAR)
description: Ghi nhan yeu cau hanh dong khac phuc doi voi nha cung cap khi phat hien loi chat luong hoac giao hang.
description_en: Record supplier corrective action requests when quality or delivery defects are identified.

sections.title: Nhan dien ho so va nha cung cap
sections.description: Khoa du ngu canh phat hanh, nha cung cap, dau moi lien he va lo bi anh huong de tao truy xuat su dung duoc ngay.
sections.description_en: Lock context, supplier, contact, and affected lot for immediate traceability.

sections.title: Su co chat luong va dinh luong anh huong
sections.description: Mo ta loi ro rang, luong hang bi anh huong va muc do nghiem trong de hanh dong containment va phan hoi duoc dat dung trong tam.
sections.description_en: Describe defect clearly, quantify affected goods and severity for focused containment and response.

sections.title: Containment, han phan hoi va phat hanh yeu cau
sections.description: Ghi nhan hanh dong chan lan rong, che do phan hoi bat buoc va trach nhiem phat hanh de kiem soat vong phan hoi nha cung cap.
sections.description_en: Record containment actions, mandatory response mode and issuance responsibility.

sections.title: Phan hoi va cam ket tu nha cung cap
sections.description: Thu thap nguyen nhan goc, hanh dong khac phuc va phong ngua tu phia nha cung cap.
sections.description_en: Collect root cause, corrective and preventive actions from supplier.

sections.title: Xac nhan hieu luc va dong ho so
sections.description: Ghi phuong phap xac nhan, ket qua va can cu dong SCAR sau khi phan hoi duoc danh gia day du.
sections.description_en: Record verification method, results and basis for SCAR closure after response evaluation.

fields.label: Ngay phat hanh SCAR
fields.helper: Ngay chinh thuc phat hanh yeu cau toi nha cung cap.
fields.helper_en: Official date the request is issued to the supplier.

fields.label: Han phan hoi nha cung cap
fields.helper: Dung de theo doi qua han va escalations.
fields.helper_en: Used to track overdue status and escalations.

fields.label: Ten nha cung cap
fields.placeholder: Nhap hoac chon nha cung cap
fields.helper: Co the go ten hoac chon tu danh sach nha cung cap da quan ly.
fields.helper_en: You may type the name or pick from the governed supplier list.

fields.label: Lien he nha cung cap
fields.placeholder: Ten, email, so dien thoai nguoi phu trach
fields.placeholder_en: Name, email, phone of responsible person

fields.label: So luong loai bo
fields.helper: Khong duoc lon hon so luong nhan.

fields.label: Mo ta loi
fields.placeholder: Mo ta chi tiet hien tuong loi, vi tri phat hien, trieu chung va anh huong thuc te...
fields.placeholder_en: Describe the defect in detail: symptoms, location, and actual impact...

fields.label: Hanh dong ngan chan
fields.placeholder: Ghi ro cach co lap hang, xu ly ton kho, chan lo tiep theo...
fields.placeholder_en: Describe how affected goods are isolated, inventory handled, next lots blocked...

fields.label: Yeu cau phan tich nguyen nhan goc
fields.checkbox_label: Yeu cau NCC phan tich nguyen nhan goc (Root Cause Analysis)
fields.checkbox_label_en: Require supplier to perform Root Cause Analysis
fields.helper: Bo chon chi khi QA quyet dinh containment-only hoac xu ly rut gon.
fields.helper_en: Uncheck only if QA decides containment-only or reduced scope.

fields.label: Nguyen nhan goc tu NCC
fields.placeholder: Nha cung cap giai thich nguyen nhan goc cua loi...
fields.placeholder_en: Supplier explains root cause of the defect...

fields.label: Hanh dong khac phuc NCC
fields.placeholder: Neu ro hanh dong khac phuc, nguoi chiu trach nhiem, thoi diem hoan tat...
fields.placeholder_en: Describe corrective action, responsible person, completion date...

fields.label: Hanh dong phong ngua NCC
fields.placeholder: Neu hanh dong phong ngua de khong tai dien...
fields.placeholder_en: Describe preventive action to avoid recurrence...

fields.label: Phuong phap xac nhan
fields.placeholder: VD: IQC lo tiep theo, audit tai cho, xac nhan bang bao cao do
fields.placeholder_en: e.g., IQC next lot, on-site audit, measurement report confirmation

fields.label: Ket qua xac nhan
fields.placeholder: Ghi ro bang chung xac nhan, ket qua kiem tra lai va quyet dinh dong / giu mo SCAR...
fields.placeholder_en: Record verification evidence, recheck results and decision to close/keep open...

signature_blocks.label: Nguoi phat hanh
signature_blocks.help: Nguoi tao va phat hanh SCAR
signature_blocks.help_en: Person who creates and issues the SCAR

signature_blocks.label: Nguoi xem xet QA
signature_blocks.help: QA xem xet va danh gia phan hoi NCC
signature_blocks.help_en: QA reviews and evaluates supplier response

signature_blocks.label: Nguoi phe duyet
signature_blocks.help: Phe duyet dong ho so SCAR
